2026/05/16 02:18:09.549801005 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549810269 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549850520 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549851601 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549872543 {
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549873474 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549887555 new <- list()
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549889158 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549903590 new$width <- width

2026/05/16 02:18:09.549929919 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/05/16 02:18:09.549968097 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549968878 new$version <- version
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549983039 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549983860 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549997691 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.549998532 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550013054 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550013795 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550027406 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550028177 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550040616 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550041347 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550080115 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550081147 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550089900 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550136450 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550137722 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550153345 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550154187 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550169029 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550169770 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550222174 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550223235 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550233250 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550233801 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550244888 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550245358 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/16 02:18:09.550292395 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550306896 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550307367 "default"))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550317512 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550317993 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550327107 }
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550327568 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550353527 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550354438 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550369581 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/16 02:18:09.550385104 }
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550386186 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550396521 }
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550397042 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550405435 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550405875 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550415209 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550416321 domain = NA)
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550436722 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550437603 }
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550451114 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550451885 old$family <- family
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550466376 }
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550467088 version <- old$version
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550479266 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",

2026/05/16 02:18:09.550499667 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/16 02:18:09.550542626 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/16 02:18:09.550566858 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/16 02:18:09.550567889 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
